notes: New world object — Bee Nest (Meadows + Black Forest). Drops a Queen Bee and 1-3 Honey when broken; stings the player for 10 poison in a 4m radius every 4 seconds while they're close. MegaDataExtractor 1.3.0 also bundled — adds a new worldPrefabs pass that dumps every ZNetScene prefab with a Destructible / Pickable / Spawner / Container / RuneStone / Vegvisir component. Drop the new DLL in and relaunch Valheim once; the next pass of convert-dump.cjs will ingest a far richer world-object catalog.
